name: Chocolate Nut Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Miniature semi-sweet chocolate chips (or finely chop 4 squares)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Beat together butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs, vanilla extract, and almond extract; beat well.
4. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt. Gradually add to the egg mixture, blending well.
5. Stir in chocolate, walnuts, pecans, cashews, and almonds.
6. Shape dough into two 14 x 1-1/2 inch logs on a greased and floured cookie sheet, about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 25 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from sheets to a cutting board and cool for 5 minutes.
8. Using a serrated knife, cut each log into diagonal slices about 3/4 inch thick.
9. Arrange slices on the cookie sheet 1/2 inch apart; bake an additional 10 minutes or until slightly dry. Cool on racks.
10. Dipped biscotti: Dip half of each biscotti or part of them into melted white chocolate, placing on a waxed paper-lined tray. Chill until chocolate is firm.
